subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy call hath been heard, and thou hast attained unto the Most Great Bounty, which is the recognition of the Ancient Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز الهی ندایت اصغا شد و بفیض اعظم که عرفان مالک قدم است فائز گشتی
subcodes.subjects: @twin duties of recognition and obedience, @knowledge; recognition of God
